violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelves in the storage shed have single use items on them are not sealed or painted.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. The door to the storage shed does not have weather stip.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary when changing gloves.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed cans of cheese stored on the floor in the kitchen.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use containers were stored on the floor in the storage shed.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. The door to the storage shed did not have weatherstrip and was not closed tightly.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
